subject: [PATCH v4 8/9] dax/kmem: add sysfs interface for atomic hotplug

2026-06-05.patch_summary: This patch adds a sysfs interface to control and query the state of an entire region of memory managed by the dax kmem driver. The new 'hotplug' attribute allows userspace to set the state of the memory region, which can be either online in one of three zones (ZONE_NORMAL, ZONE_MOVABLE, or automatically chosen), offline, or unplugged. The patch also introduces an atomic mechanism for offlining and removing all memory blocks together, eliminating a race condition that could cause hot-unplug to fail. Additionally, the patch updates the unbind routine to handle online memory more safely.
